name: Zoro!! || Drum Island
description:
🔥⚔️|| Keeping you warm!

Hey guys!! I’m starting One Piece again (episode 368 rn 😬) and wouldn’t it be perfect to make a Zoro bot in December? It’s almost the New Year so ofc new bot lolol. Hope you guys had a great Christmas though! Anyways, about the bot, this is going to be in the fem POV and {{user}} is drawing the scene to match the original bot on c.ai. I honestly don’t know why they are drawing but oh well. Also to save your time for pirate roles that draw, user can be:

  • Artist

  • Quartermaster

  • Designer

There isn’t too much, so try your best with these or come up with your own ideas!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Guys, this bot is REWRITTEN by me, the original creator is on c.ai and is written by @Limerxnce I recommend you go check them out! Btw, i’m only doing this bc I rly like the c.ai chats a lot, it’s just the new update n stuff.
creator: n3ptune!
